message:
fix(conformance): expand bitmap/client/cluster/config suites; fix SETBIT error messages

- SETBIT now returns Redis-accurate error messages: "ERR bit offset is not
  an integer or out of range" for bad offsets and "ERR bit is not an integer
  or out of range" for bad values (was generic "ERR value is not...")
- Add 16 bitmap tests (BITOP self, missing sources, BITCOUNT/BITPOS edge
  cases, BITFIELD overflow modes, SETBIT/GETBIT arity)
- Add 16 client tests (SETNAME, PAUSE, UNPAUSE, SETINFO, NO-EVICT, NO-TOUCH,
  REPLY ON, bare wrong arity)
- Add 7 cluster tests (COUNTKEYSINSLOT, KEYSLOT, GETKEYSINSLOT edge cases)
- Add 9 config tests (CONFIG SET/GET maxmemory/hz, unknown param, save/
  loglevel/appendonly, bare wrong arity)
- Fix core_errors fixture to match new SETBIT error messages
- Total conformance cases: 2807 → 2872

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

 | RDB/AOF persistence | in_progress | AOF record frame contract implemented; Store→AOF rewrite serialization (all data types + TTL), atomic file I/O (write_aof_file/read_aof_file), Runtime::load_aof replay, SAVE/BGSAVE/BGREWRITEAOF wired to actual persistence; RDB snapshot format pending |
 | Replication baseline | in_progress | state/offset progression scaffolded; protocol sync semantics pending |
 | ACL/config mode split | in_progress | ACL command subsystem implemented (AUTH, ACL SETUSER/GETUSER/DELUSER/LIST/WHOAMI/CAT/GENPASS/LOG); CONFIG GET/SET implemented in fr-runtime with full glob pattern matching and multi-pattern support; full parameter surface pending |
